Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: June 24, 2026

By accessing or using LinkHeadGen.com, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please refrain from using the site.

1. Description of Service

LinkHeadGen.com is a free, web-based tool designed to help users generate layout templates for LinkedIn headlines. The service is provided entirely free of charge and requires no email signup or registration.

2. Acceptable Use

You agree to use this tool for lawful purposes only. You are solely responsible for verifying the accuracy of any text you choose to copy and publish to your personal or company social profiles.

3. Intellectual Property

The software design, styles, client-side controller logic, and trademark LinkHeadGen.com belong to the site administrators. You may copy the headlines generated by the tool for personal or commercial use, but you may not scrape, clone, or redistribute the underlying codebase or layout system for commercial resale without written consent.

4. Disclaimers & Limitation of Liability

Our tool is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no guarantees regarding the performance, compatibility, or search ranking results of the generated headlines. In no event shall LinkHeadGen.com be liable for any damages (including loss of profile traffic, loss of employment, or recruiter response rates) arising out of the use or inability to use this tool.

5. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the site after changes constitute acceptance of the updated terms.

© 2026 LinkHeadGen.com. All rights reserved.

Create recruiter-friendly LinkedIn headlines instantly.
